import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:"https://portfolio-backend-byp8.onrender.com/api"});// ── Projects ────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getProjects=function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return API.get('/projects',{params});};export const getProject=id=>API.get("/projects/".concat(id));export const createProject=data=>API.post('/projects',data);// ── Contact ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const submitContact=data=>API.post('/contact',data);// ── Health ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const checkHealth=()=>API.get('/health');export default API;
